👋 Hi, I'm Moe Kyaw Aung
🇲🇲 Myanmar 📍 Tachileik 📱 Android Dev 5+ Years
"Code is like a horse — it takes practice, patience, and the right momentum to make it run beautifully."
🚀 About Me
Senior Android Developer with 5+ years of experience crafting high-performance mobile applications. Passionate about Clean Architecture, modern Android development patterns, and building developer learning resources for Burmese-speaking audiences.
I specialize in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and scalable MVVM architecture. Currently active on GitHub building interactive tools, animated portfolios, and developer education content.

Work

Featured Projects

🌐 moekyawaung-china.github.io
Animated portfolio GitHub Page with horse running background, coding theme, dark mode, and modern micro-interactions. The one you're looking at right now!
HTML/CSS ★ Portfolio
🌍 Moekyaw's Translator
AI-powered multilingual translation app built with Gemini API. Features voice input/output, language detection, and support for Burmese, English, Chinese, Japanese, and more.
JavaScript ★ AI App
🎲 3D Rubik's Cube
Full feature 3D Rubik's Cube in a single HTML file using Three.js. Supports multiple cube sizes, animation styles, color schemes, and interactive touch controls.
HTML / Three.js ★ 3D Game
📱 Android Dev Learning Portal
Interactive Burmese-language learning portal for Android development. Covers Programming Basics, MVP Design, GitHub mobile usage with mind-map driven content.
Kotlin / Web ★ Education
📖 Burmese GitHub Guide
Comprehensive Burmese-language GitHub mobile usage guide. Covers account setup, cloning (GitHub Mobile, Termux, ZIP), Git commands, and PAT authentication.
Markdown ★ Docs
✨ Animated GitHub READMEs
Multiple animated GitHub profile READMEs across accounts (moekyawaung-tech, Moe-kyaw-Aung-microsoft). SVG animations, contribution graphs, and dynamic badges.
SVG / Markdown ★ Profile
Moe Kyaw Aung
Senior Android Developer · Tachileik, Myanmar
Contents
  1. Early Life & Education
  2. Career
  3. Technical Philosophy
  4. Open Source & Community
  5. Personal Interests
Moe Kyaw Aung is a Senior Android Developer based in Tachileik, Myanmar, with over five years of professional experience building Android applications. He is known for his expertise in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and scalable mobile architecture patterns including MVVM and Clean Architecture.
Early Life & Education
Moe Kyaw Aung pursued higher education in Computer Science at the University of Computer Studies (Pathein), where he earned a Bachelor of Science degree. Simultaneously, he expanded his academic background with a Bachelor of Arts in English from Pathein Distance University, reflecting his dual commitment to technical and linguistic proficiency.
Career
With more than five years of professional Android development, Moe Kyaw Aung has built a reputation for delivering production-grade applications using modern Android tooling. His technical stack centers on Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Firebase, and automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Fastlane.
In parallel with mobile development, he has expanded into web-based interactive projects, including a 3D Rubik's Cube game using Three.js, an AI-powered translation application built on the Gemini API, and several animated GitHub portfolio pages that showcase both his technical and creative abilities.
Technical Philosophy
Moe Kyaw Aung advocates for clean, testable code organized around separation of concerns. He consistently applies Clean Architecture principles across projects, using repository patterns, use cases, and dependency injection to ensure maintainability at scale. He values code readability and comprehensive documentation as first-class concerns.
Open Source & Community
A strong advocate for developer education in Myanmar, Moe Kyaw Aung creates learning resources tailored to Burmese-speaking audiences, including GitHub guides, interactive learning portals, and development tutorials. He maintains multiple GitHub accounts and actively contributes to open source tooling and educational repositories.
Personal Interests
Beyond professional development, Moe Kyaw Aung is interested in procedural animation, creative coding, and interactive web experiences. His passion projects include CSS-only animations, such as the galloping horse that animates across the header of this very page — a nod to the elegance achievable through pure CSS physics simulation.
